entity.summary: Decentralized exchange aggregator and trading-protocol network whose first MVP was built at an ETHGlobal hackathon in New York in May 2019. The network later expanded across multiple chains and introduced Fusion, an intent-based swap mode, in December 2022.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record for the 1inch aggregation and swap ecosystem. The 2019-05-19 marker follows the official fifth-anniversary chronology.

events.title: 1inch emerged from the ETHNewYork hackathon
events.description: Sergej Kunz and Anton Bukov built the MVP that became the 1inch DEX aggregation protocol during an ETHGlobal hackathon in New York in May 2019.
events.notes: HEI uses the official anniversary date as the operational origin marker.

events.title: 1inch released the Fusion swap upgrade
events.description: 1inch released Fusion, an intent-based upgrade centered on the 1inch Swap Engine that introduced resolver-executed swaps, network-fee abstraction and additional MEV protection.
events.notes: Modeled as a major protocol upgrade rather than a separate exchange entity.

evidence.title: 1inch Press Room
evidence.notes: Official history states that 1inch began at the New York ETHGlobal hackathon in May 2019.

evidence.title: Looking back on 5 years of innovation: 1inch in 2019
evidence.notes: Official retrospective covering the 2019 hackathon origin.

evidence.title: 1inch official website
evidence.notes: Current official network and product site.
